completion_promises.criterion_text: Parser tests cover all 6 subcommands: ping, video-info, get-transcript, list-transcripts, extract-insights, list-focus-areas
completion_promises.evidence: TestCliParser contains test_ping_subcommand, test_video_info_subcommand, test_get_transcript_subcommand, test_list_transcripts_subcommand, test_extract_insights_subcommand, and test_list_focus_areas_subcommand. All 6 verify args.command matches the expected subcommand name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Parser tests verify default values (language=en, no_segments=False, focus_areas=general, max_insights=10)

TestCliParser contains test_language_flag (--language fr), test_no_segments_flag (--no-segments), test_focus_flag (--focus youtube-channel), test_focus_flag_multiple_comma_separated (--focus entrepreneurial,investment), test_video_id_flag (--video-id dQw4w9WgXcQ), test_video_id_flag_default_empty, test_max_insights_flag (--max-insights 5), and test_max_insights_flag_is_int (verifies int type).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Output tests verify ping returns valid JSON with status=healthy and mode=cli
completion_promises.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_ping_returns_valid_json (json.loads on stdout), test_ping_status_healthy (asserts data['status']=='healthy'), test_ping_mode_cli (asserts data['mode']=='cli'), test_ping_exit_code_zero, and test_ping_includes_server_metadata.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Output tests verify error results produce exit code 1
completion_promises.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_error_result_produces_exit_code_1 (video-info with invalid URL asserts exit_code==1 and 'error' in data), test_error_result_has_error_structure (verifies error dict has code and message), test_get_transcript_invalid_url_exit_code_1, and test_list_transcripts_invalid_url_exit_code_1.

completion_promises.evidence: TestCliOutput contains test_list_focus_areas_returns_all_presets (checks all 6 preset names: general, entrepreneurial, investment, technical, youtube-channel, ai-learning are present in data['focus_areas']), test_list_focus_areas_returns_valid_json (checks focus_areas, category_definitions, usage_tip keys), test_list_focus_areas_presets_contain_categories (verifies each preset has a non-empty category list), and test_list_focus_areas_exit_code_zero.

test_output_summary: 34 tests passed, 0 failed. Coverage of src/cli.py: 76% (unit only), 86% (combined with existing tests). All quality gates met.
implementation_notes: Created tests/unit/test_cli.py with two test classes: TestCliParser (18 tests covering all 6 subcommands, default values, and flag parsing) and TestCliOutput (16 tests covering ping JSON output, error exit codes, list-focus-areas presets, extract-insights output, mocked get-transcript output, and stdout purity). Tests exercise the existing src/cli.py implementation via make_parser() for parsing tests and main() for output tests. Uses capsys for stdout capture and unittest.mock for TranscriptClient mocking.
